# StreamVault TV

A modern, beautiful IPTV player with a professional dark theme. Watch live TV channels from Bangladesh, India, Sports, Music, and more.

## Features

- **Modern UI/UX**: Professional teal/cyan theme with glass-morphism effects
- **Responsive Design**: Works on mobile, tablet, and desktop
- **Touch Gestures**: Swipe to change channels, adjust volume, double-tap for fullscreen
- **Keyboard Shortcuts**: Full keyboard navigation support
- **HLS Streaming**: Supports .m3u8 live streams via HLS.js
- **PWA Ready**: Install on mobile as a standalone app
- **Favorites**: Save your favorite channels for quick access
- **Categories**: Browse channels by category (Bangla News, Bangla TV, Indian, Sports, Music, International)
- **Local Storage**: Remembers your last channel, volume, and favorites

## Keyboard Shortcuts

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| Space | Play/Pause |
| M | Mute/Unmute |
| F | Toggle Fullscreen |
| S | Show/Hide Statistics |
| 0-9 | Enter channel number |
| Arrow Up/Down | Volume Up/Down |
| Arrow Left/Right | Seek -10s/+10s |
| Escape | Close sidebar |
| H or ? | Show Help |
| C | Open Settings |

## Touch Gestures (Mobile)

- **Swipe Left/Right**: Next/Previous channel
- **Swipe Up/Down**: Volume up/down
- **Double Tap**: Toggle fullscreen

## Tech Stack

- React 18 + TypeScript
- Vite
- Tailwind CSS
- HLS.js for streaming
- Lucide React for icons

## Getting Started

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

## Build for Production

```bash
npm run build
```
